papers.key_insight: LSTMs and HMMs generalize across varying robot motions; multi-feature tactile sensing (force + area + motion) outperforms single features

papers.title: In-Hand Object-Dynamics Inference using Tactile Fingertips
papers.key_insight: Factor graph fusing multi-finger tactile data enables friction and inertial parameter estimation without torque sensing

papers.title: Under Pressure: Learning to Detect Slip with Barometric Tactile Sensors
papers.key_insight: Barometric tactile sensors (low-res but ultra-durable/cheap) achieve 91% slip detection accuracy with learning-based methods

papers.title: TacGNN: Learning Tactile-based In-hand Manipulation with a Blind Robot
papers.key_insight: Graph neural network processes tactile signals for blind in-hand manipulation; Baoding ball task with 0.096cm RMSE, zero-shot sim-to-real

papers.title: Proprioceptive State Estimation for Amphibious Tactile Sensing
papers.key_insight: Vision-based proprioception in soft robotic finger achieves 1.96mm deformation accuracy; works in both terrestrial and aquatic environments

papers.title: AdapTac: Adaptive Visuo-Tactile Fusion with Predictive Force Attention for Dexterous Manipulation
papers.key_insight: Force-guided attention adaptively weights vision vs tactile at different manipulation stages; 93% avg success rate across 3 dexterous tasks, vision-only baseline 73%

papers.title: Sparsh-X: Tactile Beyond Pixels - Multisensory Touch Representations for Robot Manipulation
papers.key_insight: First multisensory touch backbone across 4 modalities (image/audio/motion/pressure); 63% policy improvement, 90% robustness boost, 48% physical property accuracy gain

papers.title: ManiFeel: Benchmarking and Understanding Visuotactile Manipulation Policy Learning
papers.key_insight: First reproducible benchmark for visuotactile policy learning; supervised policies struggle with limited visual input - tactile becomes critical

papers.title: Self-supervised Perception for Tactile Skin Covered Dexterous Hands
papers.key_insight: Extends Sparsh to full-hand tactile skin; self-supervised learning across entire robotic hand surface

papers.title: CLTP: Contrastive Language-Tactile Pre-training for 3D Contact Geometry Understanding
papers.key_insight: Contrastive learning aligns tactile signals with language descriptions; enables zero-shot tactile understanding via text prompts
